what: Generate Response Surface Contour Plots for eFAST Results — getContourPlot
title: Generate Response Surface Contour Plots for eFAST Results — getContourPlot
text: Generates matrix contour plots visualizing pairwise response surfaces model outputs based eFAST sensitivity analysis results.

title: Generate Response Surface Contour Plots for eFAST Results — getContourPlot
Generate Response Surface Contour Plots for eFAST Results — getContourPlot
text: efastResults list object containing complete results eFAST sensitivity analysis. Expected structure: InputOutputDf Data frame containing simulation inputs, output paths, PK parameters, calculated values. Parameters Data frame list containing parameter metadata, specifically path displayName. Results Data frame containing calculated sensitivity indices (Measure, Value, ParameterDisplayName). Outputs Data frame list containing output metadata (path, displayName). jitterSize numeric value representing noise magnitude added interpolation. Passed getPairwiseGrid. Defaults 0 (though getPairwiseGrid may apply default needed). gridSize integer specifying resolution contour grids. Defaults 40. logScale Logical. TRUE (default), response variable (Z-axis) log-transformed (log10) plotting. recommended PK data large dynamic ranges. data contains zeros negative values, function automatically falls back linear scale warning.

title: Generate Response Surface Contour Plots for eFAST Results — getContourPlot
text: nested list ggplot objects, structured : plotList[[outputName]][[pkParameter]]. element complete ggplot object ready printing saving.

title: Generate Response Surface Contour Plots for eFAST Results — getContourPlot
text: function creates visualization tool identify parameter interactions non-linearities. process involves: Iterating every unique Output PK parameter (e.g., "C_max", "AUC") results. Output/PK combination, extracting relevant simulation data. Calling getPairwiseGrid generate interpolated surfaces parameter pairs. Optionally applying log-transformation response values (Z-axis) handle wide dynamic ranges common PK/PD. Ranking parameters based Total Sensitivity index ($S_T$) influential parameters appear top-left plot matrix. Constructing ggplot2 object using geom_contour_filled facet_grid display full matrix pairwise interactions. resulting plot scatterplot matrix : -diagonal cells display filled contours response surface two parameters. Diagonal cells display names parameters.

title: Generate Pairwise Interpolation Grids — getPairwiseGrid
text: helper function takes subset simulation data list parameter columns, generates grid interpolated response values every pairwise combination parameters.

title: Generate Pairwise Interpolation Grids — getPairwiseGrid
text: data data frame containing parameter inputs result output values. paramCols character vector column names data representing input parameters (predictors) paired. zVar string specifying column name data used response variable (Z-axis). jitterSize numeric value specifying magnitude uniform noise added parameters interpolation prevent collinearity errors. inside function specified, though argument available tuning. gridSize integer specifying resolution interpolation grid (e.g., 40 results 40x40 grid).

title: Generate Pairwise Interpolation Grids — getPairwiseGrid
text: data frame long format containing stacked results valid pairwise interpolations. data frame includes: x Interpolated x-coordinate values (parameter 1). y Interpolated y-coordinate values (parameter 2). z Interpolated response values. xLab Name parameter x-axis. yLab Name parameter y-axis. Returns NULL valid interpolation grids generated (e.g., parameters constant).

title: Generate Pairwise Interpolation Grids — getPairwiseGrid
text: function iterates unique pairs columns specified paramCols. pair, uses interp::interp function interpolate scattered simulation data onto regular grid (defined gridSize). handle potential collinearity issues common eFAST trajectories (can cause triangulation failures interp), small amount random noise (jitter) added parameter values interpolation. Pairs one parameters insufficient variation (fewer 5 unique values) skipped prevent errors.

title: runSU — runSU
text: simulation PKML simulation object. DDIsimulation DDI PKML simulation object. customParameters List SAParameter objects user-specified distributions. outputs List SAOutput objects. evaluateForAllParameters Logical value.  TRUE, model parameters evaluated sensitivity sensitivity greater sensitivityThreshold undergo uncertainty analysis.  parameters included customParameters list log-uniform distribution bounds set variationRange. Sensitivity analysis settings: variationRange variation range used define log-uniform distribution parameters parameterPaths. numberOfSensitivityAnalysisSteps Positive integer.  Number steps model simulated within parameter's variationRange sensitivity analysis. sensitivityThreshold Positive numeric value.  threshold sensitivity parameter undergo uncertainty analysis runUncertaintyAnalysis runUncertaintlyOnlyForSensitiveParameters TRUE. Uncertainty analysis settings: runUncertaintyAnalysis Logical value.  TRUE, uncertainty analysis run. runUncertaintlyOnlyForSensitiveParameters Logical value.  TRUE, uncertainty analysis run parameters sensitivity exceeds sensitivityThreshold. numberOfUncertaintyAnalysisSamples Positive integer value giving number Monte Carlo runs parameter. quantiles Vector numerical values 0 1.  quantiles input sets percentiles PK parameters evaluated addition 50% 95% percentiles, computed default. Save settings: saveResults Logical value.  TRUE, results saved. saveFolder String indicating path folder results saved. saveFileName String indicating file name use saving results. Parallel run updating settings runParallel Logical value.  Sensitivity computation run parallel TRUE. updateProgressSensitivity Logical value.  Updates shiny app GUI sensitivity analysis progress TRUE. updateProgressUncertainty Logical value.  Updates shiny app GUI uncertainty analysis progress TRUE.
